m: (briefly) once through; in general; the whole

ex.jp: 説明書を一通り読んでから、組み立て始めた。
ex.en: After reading through the manual once, I started assembling it.

qs.s: 資料には＿＿＿＿目を通しておいてください。
qs.en: Please look through the materials once beforehand.
qs.e: 一通り目を通す = to give something a once-over. すっかり = completely, めったに = rarely (＋neg.), わざわざ = taking the trouble to.

qs.s: 「一通り」の意味は？
qs.e: 一通り = going over the whole of something once, in a general way.

ex.jp: この店は週末でも割と空いている。
ex.en: This shop is relatively empty even on weekends.

qs.s: 難しそうに見えたが、試験は＿＿＿＿簡単だった。
qs.en: It looked difficult, but the exam was relatively easy.
qs.e: 割と = relatively / more than expected. 決して, まるで and 少しも all require a negative ending, so they can't fit 簡単だった.

qs.s: 「割と」の意味は？
qs.e: 割と = to a fair degree, more than you would expect.

m: without permission; arbitrarily; as one pleases

ex.jp: 彼は勝手に予定を決めて、みんなを困らせた。
ex.en: He decided the schedule on his own and troubled everyone.

qs.s: 人の物を＿＿＿＿使ってはいけない。
qs.en: You mustn't use other people's things without permission.
qs.e: 勝手に = without permission / as one pleases. 確かに = certainly, 互いに = mutually, 徐々に = gradually.

qs.s: 「勝手に」の意味は？
qs.e: 勝手に = acting on one's own, without asking or considering others.

ex.jp: 待ち合わせの場所を指定してください。
ex.en: Please specify a place to meet.

qs.s: 新幹線のチケットには座席が＿＿＿＿されている。
qs.en: The seat is assigned on the bullet-train ticket.
qs.e: 座席を指定する = to assign/reserve a specific seat (指定席 = reserved seat). 指示 = instruction, 指摘 = pointing out, 指導 = guidance.

qs.s: 「指定」の意味は？
qs.e: 指定 = singling out a specific thing, place, or time as the designated one.

ex.jp: 兄弟は別々の学校に通っている。
ex.en: The brothers go to separate schools.

qs.s: 会計は一緒ではなく、＿＿＿＿でお願いします。
qs.en: We'd like to pay separately, not together.
qs.e: 別々 = separately / individually (the opposite of 一緒). 一斉 = all at once, 順番 = in turns, 同時 = at the same time.

qs.s: 「別々」の意味は？
qs.e: 別々 = each thing apart from the others, not together.

ex.jp: 事故の原因はまだ特定されていない。
ex.en: The cause of the accident has not yet been identified.

qs.s: この薬は＿＿＿＿の病気にしか効かない。
qs.en: This medicine only works on specific illnesses.
qs.e: 特定の = specific / particular (the opposite of 一般 'general'). 共通 = shared, 多数 = a large number.

qs.s: 「特定」の意味は？
qs.e: 特定 = pinpointing one particular thing rather than things in general.

ex.jp: 彼女は出版社で編集の仕事をしている。
ex.en: She works in editing at a publishing company.

qs.s: この動画は不要な部分を切って＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: This video was edited by cutting out the unnecessary parts.
qs.e: 編集 = editing (cutting and arranging footage or text). 録画 = recording, 再生 = playback, 保存 = saving.

qs.s: 「編集」の意味は？
qs.e: 編集 = arranging and trimming material (text, audio, video) into a finished form.

ex.jp: 友達の試合を応援しに行った。
ex.en: I went to cheer on my friend's match.

qs.s: スタンドのファンが選手を大声で＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: The fans in the stands cheered the players loudly.
qs.e: 応援する = to cheer on / support. 応募 = applying (for a job/contest), 応対 = dealing with a customer, 反応 = reaction.

qs.s: 「応援」の意味は？
qs.e: 応援 = backing someone with encouragement, cheers, or help.

ex.jp: 彼は若手として各分野で活躍している。
ex.en: As a young talent, he is active across various fields.

qs.s: 新人選手がチームで大いに＿＿＿＿している。
qs.en: The rookie player is playing a very active role on the team.
qs.e: 活躍する = to play an active, prominent, successful role. 出場 = appearing/competing, 引退 = retiring, 練習 = practising.

qs.s: 「活躍」の意味は？
qs.e: 活躍 = being energetically active and standing out with success.

ex.jp: 複数の専門家に意見を聞いた。
ex.en: I asked several experts for their opinions.

qs.s: この問題には＿＿＿＿の答えが考えられる。
qs.en: Multiple answers can be considered for this problem.
qs.e: 複数 = plural / more than one (the opposite of 単数 'singular'). 多少 = more or less, 大量 = a large quantity.

qs.s: 「複数」の意味は？
qs.e: 複数 = two or more; several, as opposed to a single one.
